mapper.select: SELECT id, code_type AS codeType, code_value AS codeValue, label_zh AS labelZh, remark, update_time AS updateTime FROM twin_automation_display_map ORDER BY code_type, code_value
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO twin_automation_display_map (code_type, code_value, label_zh, remark, update_time) VALUES (#{codeType}, #{codeValue}, #{labelZh}, #{remark}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE twin_automation_display_map SET code_type = #{codeType}, code_value = #{codeValue}, label_zh = #{labelZh}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
